shortDescription: Converted warehouse loft in Financial District featuring 1 bedrooms, original beams, and polished concrete.
fullDescription: Welcome to 1 King Street West, Unit 2710 in the vibrant Financial District neighbourhood. This converted loft showcases soaring ceilings, exposed structural elements, and an open industrial aesthetic. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
